ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label or title of the asset */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the asset (e.g., image/jpeg, text/xml) */,
  "size_bytes" TEXT /* Size of the asset in bytes */,
  "download_link" TEXT /* Download link for the asset */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the asset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was uploaded */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the asset was last modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the asset */,
  "thumbnail_link" TEXT /* Link to a thumbnail version of the asset */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure the integrity of the asset */,
  "copyright_status" TEXT /* Information about the copyright status of the asset */,
  "license" TEXT /* The license under which the asset is distributed */,
  "creator" TEXT /* The name or ID of the creator of the asset */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date the asset was originally created */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the asset has been accessed */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the asset has been downloaded */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the asset is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the category is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the category was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata_records" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., EXIF, Dublin Core) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  "metadata_date" TEXT /* The date the metadata was created or last updated */,
  "metadata_creator_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who created or updated the metadata */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the metadata record is active */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* The source of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_records_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, student) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* The user's affiliation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date the user last logged in */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the asset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the asset */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the access was successful */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the asset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* A detailed changelog of the changes made in this version */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* The approval status of the version (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* The date the version was approved */,
  "is_revertable" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the version can be reverted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is granted to */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the permission is for */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "is_inherited" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the permission is inherited */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* The date the permission expires */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the permission was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who created the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collection */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the collection was created */,
  "parent_collection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent collection */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the collection is publicly accessible */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the collection has been accessed */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* The number of times assets in the collection have been downloaded */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the collection was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_parent_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id")
)
